events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Czechia vs Mexico
events.note: Czechia faces Mexico in a crucial Group A match at the FIFA World Cup 2026 in Mexico City.
events.marketing_angle: Highlighting Czechia's pivotal World Cup match against Mexico, emphasizing national pride and team spirit.
events.why_selected: As the Czech national team competes in the World Cup, this match is of utmost importance to the Czech audience.

events.title: Formula 1: Austrian Grand Prix
events.note: The Formula 1 season continues with the Austrian Grand Prix at the Red Bull Ring in Spielberg, Austria.
events.marketing_angle: Promoting the excitement of the Austrian Grand Prix, appealing to motorsport enthusiasts in the Czech Republic.
events.why_selected: Formula 1 is a major motorsport event with a significant following in the Czech Republic.

events.title: St. John’s Day (Midsummer)
events.note: Celebration of St. John’s Day, a traditional Czech holiday marking the beginning of summer with various cultural festivities.
events.marketing_angle: Showcasing traditional Czech midsummer celebrations, emphasizing cultural heritage and community spirit.
events.why_selected: St. John’s Day is a significant cultural event in the Czech Republic, celebrated with various traditions and festivities.
